message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #333333
skinparam classHeaderBorderSize 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomSize 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopSize 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftSize 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightSize 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderRadius 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomRadius 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopRadius 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftRadius 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightRadius 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomStyle solid
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopStyle solid
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftStyle solid
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightStyle solid
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomWidth 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopWidth 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftWidth 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightWidth 1
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextAlign center
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextVAlign middle
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextPadding 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextMargin 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextSpacing 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderBottomTextOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderTopTextOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderLeftTextOffset 0
skinparam classHeaderBorderRightTextOffset 0

package "domain" {
    interface "INodeVisitor" as INodeVisitor {
        + visit(node: Probe)
        + visit(node: Input)
        + visit(node: AndGate)
        + visit(node: NAndGate)
        + visit(node: NORGate)
        + visit(node: ORGate)
        + visit(node: XORGate)
    }

    class "Circuit" as Circuit {
        + Circuit()
        + addNode(node: Node)
        + addInput(node: Input)
        + addProbe(node: Probe)
        + getNodes(): Set<Node>
        + getInputs(): Set<Input>
        + getInput(name: String)
        + getProbes(): Set<Probe>
        + getProbe(name: String)
        + simulate()
        + addSimulationListener(simulationListener: ISimulationListener)
        + addSimulationListeners(simulationListeners: Collection<ISimulationListener>)
    }

    class "Node" as Node {
        + value: boolean
        + name: String
        + Node(name: String)
        + getValue(): boolean
        + getName(): String
        + addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
        + addSimulationListener(simulationListener: ISimulationListener)
        + notifyStartCalculation()
        + notifyStopCalculation(calculatedValue: boolean)
        + calculate(): boolean
        + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class "NodeComposite" as NodeComposite {
        + parents: List<Node>
        + NodeComposite(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        + addParent(node: Node)
        + removeParent(node: Node)
        + getParents(): List<Node>
        + calculate(): boolean
    }

    class "ISimulationListener" as ISimulationListener {
    }

    class "Input" as Input {
        + Input(value: boolean, name: String)
        + setValue(value: boolean)
        + calculate(): boolean
        + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
        + addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
    }

    class "AndGate" as AndGate {
        + AndGate(name: String)
        + AndGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        + calculate(): boolean
        + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class "NAndGate" as NAndGate {
        + NAndGate(name: String)
        + NAndGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        + calculate(): boolean
        + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class "NORGate" as NORGate {
        + NORGate(name: String)
        + NORGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        + calculate(): boolean
        + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class "NotGate" as NotGate {
        + NotGate(name: String)
        + NotGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        + calculate(): boolean
        + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class "ORGate" as ORGate {
        + ORGate(name: String)
        + ORGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        + calculate(): boolean
        + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class "XORGate" as XORGate {
        + XORGate(name: String)
        + XORGate(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        + calculate(): boolean
        + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
    }

    class "Probe" as Probe {
        + Probe(name: String)
        + Probe(parents: List<Node>, name: String)
        + calculate(): boolean
        + accept(nodeVisitor: INodeVisitor)
        + addToCircuit(circuit: Circuit)
    }

    Node <|-- NodeComposite
    NodeComposite <|-- AndGate
    NodeComposite <|-- NAndGate
    NodeComposite <|-- NORGate
    NodeComposite <|-- NotGate
    NodeComposite <|-- ORGate
    NodeComposite <|-- XORGate
    NodeComposite <|-- Probe
    Node <|-- Input

    Circuit "0..*" -- "nodes" Node
    Circuit "0..*" -- "inputs" Input
    Circuit "0..*" -- "probes" Probe
    Circuit "0..*" -- "simulationListeners" ISimulationListener
    Node "0..*" -- "parents" NodeComposite
    Node "0..*" -- "simulationListeners" ISimulationListener
    Input "0..*" -- "simulationListeners" ISimulationListener
    Probe "0..*" -- "simulationListeners" ISimulationListener
}
@enduml
